name_en: N00109 Pocket Wallet! This pocket wallet is rendered in Damoflage coated canvas with vibrant tones, featuring card slots, an interior pocket, and a rear external patch pocket. Its compact design makes it easy to slide into various pockets.
name_cn:
N00109 Pocket Wallet! This pocket wallet is rendered in Damoflage coated canvas with vibrant tones, featuring card slots, an interior pocket, and a rear external patch pocket. Its compact design makes it easy to slide into various pockets.
11.1 x 1 x 7.5 cm
(High x Width x Length)
